subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Illumine this assemblage and make of this gathering a light unto the world, for their intention is the universal good [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار اين انجمن را روشن نما و اين جمع را شمع عالم کن زيرا نيتشان خير عمومی است
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for governments and rulers, @unity of governments; political unity, @promotion of commerce and industry, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @East and West; communication between East and West, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
